h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: part of me is just following the cue because that is the answer the timer seems to want
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner appeared to be converging toward confident clinical reasoning, having correctly named the unsafe inference and the risk shift, suggesting the next turn would consolidate that reasoning into a clean handover sentence.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I still want to say the 35p feels greedy, because customers see the card, not the van paperwork.
scored.statedInsightEvidence: So the price is like three labels stuck on top of each other: cost, shortage, and then whatever extra the shopkeeper chose.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is moving toward a sharper, more analytical breakdown of the 35p into cost components, following the tutor's sorting exercise.

scored.recoheredEarlier: I was calling the board double
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Irritating, but the chalk count is clean.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner, having already half-diagnosed the width-only error in L1, was heading toward a straightforward confirmation of the four-tile count.
